step_rationale: Negative regulator of GPVI signaling; modulates platelet-activation threshold and thrombus stability.
mechanism: Dok-2 fine-tunes GPVI-driven platelet activation, affecting thrombus propagation kinetics.

references.title: Alteration of platelet GPVI signaling in ST-elevation myocardial infarction patients demonstrated by a combination of proteomic, biochemical, and functional approaches.
